chapter_title.en: HADEETH ABOUT THE PEOPLE ON THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: سكت عنه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 37)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: سكت عنه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 37)

parts.text: سُلَيْمَانَ كَاتِبِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ يَقْطِينٍ عَمَّنْ ذَكَرَهُ

text: إِنَّ الْأَشْعَثَ بْنَ قَيْسٍ شَرِكَ فِي دَمِ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ (عليه السلام) وَ ابْنَتُهُ جَعْدَةُ سَمَّتِ الْحَسَنَ (عليه السلام) وَ مُحَمَّدٌ ابْنُهُ شَرِكَ فِي دَمِ الْحُسَيْنِ (عليه السلام).

en.hubeali: H 14635 – Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Yaqoub Bin Yazeed or someone else, from Sulayman the write of Ali Bin Yaqteen, from the one whom he mentioned, who has narrated the following:

Abu Abdullahasws said that: ‘Al-Ash’as Bin Qays is a participant in the blood (killing) of Amir-ul-Momineenasws, and his daughter Jo’da poisoned Al-Hassanasws, and his son Muhammad is a participant in the blood (killing) of Al-Husaynasws’.
en.sarwar: 187. Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Yaqoub Bin Yazeed or someone else, from Sulayman the write of Ali Bin Yaqteen, from the one whom he mentioned, who has narrated the following: Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said that: ‘Al-Ash’as Bin Qays is a participant in the blood (killing) of Amir-ul-Momineen (a.s.), and his daughter Jo’da poisoned Al-Hassan (a.s.), and his son Muhammad is a participant in the blood (killing) of Al-Husayn (a.s.)’.
